## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps for blog and integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has completed 10 integration page refreshes, with 10 more planned this week](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [New content opportunities identified around WordPress vs. Strapi, leveraging current industry discussions](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Concerns raised about QA process for refreshed content; team exploring solutions for version tracking](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Content performance metrics show promising results, with 2.7% CTR outperforming blog average](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)

## Topics

### Integration Page Updates

  - [10 integration pages refreshed, following Strapi's suggested outline](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Focus on adding broader, top-of-funnel content rather than technical details](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Andrej added missing SEO fields (meta descriptions, canonical URLs) to improve rankings](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Team to review updated pages for accuracy and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)

### Content Strategy for WordPress Drama

  - [Paul suggested creating content comparing WordPress and Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Victor cautioned against appearing opportunistic; focus on highlighting Strapi's strengths without directly addressing the drama](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Team agreed to accelerate related topics while maintaining a neutral stance](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

### Content Refresh Process

  - [Concerns raised about QA for refreshed content and tracking changes](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Current Strapi v4 lacks draft/publish versioning (coming in v5)](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Exploring options for backing up old versions and analyzing refresh impact](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Need to ensure refreshed v4 content points to v5 documentation or tutorials](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

### Draft Articles and New Topics

  - [Theodore reviewed draft on Strapi and Angular, suggested title change](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [Waiting for new topics to be added to Strapi board](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Andrej to re-run drafts through V2 workflow for review](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)

### Performance Reporting

  - [2.7% overall CTR reported, considered good performance](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Jimmy suggested benchmarking against in-house content after one month of indexing](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Golzar requested additional metrics like bounce rate and user journey data](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Team to explore tagging system to differentiate GrowthX-written articles](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

### Click-Through Rate Analysis

  - [Marcel noted 2.7-2.9% CTR is significantly higher than the 1.7% blog average (excluding branded searches)](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Suggested quick wins by optimizing meta descriptions and titles for underperforming pages](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete 10 more integration page refreshes by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Develop content ideas around WordPress vs. Strapi, focusing on Strapi's strengths](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Implement system for tracking content changes and versions](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Add callouts in refreshed v4 content pointing to v5 documentation](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Re-run draft articles through V2 workflow for review](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [Create tagging system to differentiate GrowthX-written articles](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Explore optimizing meta descriptions and titles for quick CTR improvements](https://fathom.video/share/zNiCQQ6qi8MVhF3z9bHqz6xTy25vZAFw?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
